items.reason: Covers core LogSampler rate derivation, boundary validation, hash threshold decisions, distributions, disabled fast path, and concurrent config/hot-path reads.
Covers LogSampleConfigPb update/populate behavior, invalid ppm rejection, previous-good retention, disabled transitions, and request-only derivation semantics.
Covers LOG/PLOG/VLOG/CHECK integration, sampled-in diagnostic forcing, sampled-out payload skipping, and background log bypass.
Covers access sampling decisions, request-sampled access forcing, REQUEST_OUT exclusion, logSampled marker formatting, and access guard behavior.
Covers the new AccessRecorder typed facades, lazy provider execution, sampled-out skips, key truncation/non-NUL handling, and async/shared pointer usage patterns.
Covers request sampling metadata states for disabled, full-rate, zero-rate, admitted/rejected, and undecided RPC propagation cases.
CrossProcessSamplingConsistency only runs Set/Get/Del operations and does not assert that sampled-in/rejected decisions or log output are consistent across client and worker.
The PR changes dynamic sampler flag transaction/rollback behavior, but this touched test only changes formatting and does not exercise UpdateFlagParameter for the new sample-rate flags.
The new public EmbeddedConfig RequestSampleRate/AccessSampleRate/DiagnosticSampleRate setters and invalid-rate no-op behavior are not covered by this PR.
